recommendations.title: Taxi 2
recommendations.overview: A cabdriver and a cop race to Paris to rescue a love interest and the Japanese minister of defense from kidnappers.

recommendations.title: Wasabi
recommendations.overview: Hubert is a French policeman with very sharp methods. After being forced to take 2 months off by his boss, who doesn't share his view on working methods, he goes back to Japan, where he used to work 19 years ago, to settle the probate of his girlfrie

recommendations.title: Fan-Fan the Tulip
recommendations.overview: In this 2003 remake of the classic 1952 French film, Fanfan la Tulipe is a swashbuckling lover who is tricked into joining the army of King Louis XV by Adeline La Franchise, who tells Fanfan that by doing so, he will eventually marry one of the king'

recommendations.title: Taxi 3
recommendations.overview: A gang of thieves calling themselves the Santa Claus Gang are wreaking havoc, and the police can't keep up. Police Captain Gilbert is distracted by a Chinese reporter writing a story on his squad, and taxi driver Daniel is in the midst of a relations

recommendations.title: The Red Inn
recommendations.overview: A group of travelers, including a monk, stay in a lonely inn in the mountains. The host confesses the monk his habit of serving poisoned soup to the guests, to rob their possessions and to bury them in the backyard. The story unfolds as the monk trie

recommendations.title: The Siege of Jadotville
recommendations.overview: Irish Commandant Pat Quinlan leads a stand off with troops against French and Belgian Mercenaries in the Congo during the early 1960s.

recommendations.title: Murder on the Orient Express
recommendations.overview: Genius Belgian detective Hercule Poirot investigates the murder of an American tycoon aboard the Orient Express train.

recommendations.title: Avengement
recommendations.overview: While on a prison furlough, a lowly criminal evades his guards and returns to his old stomping ground to take revenge on the people who turned him into a cold blooded killer.

recommendations.title: Nothing to Declare
recommendations.overview: During the elimination of the Belgian/French border in the 90s, a Belgian customs officer is forced to team up with one of his French counterparts.

recommendations.title: Trouble
recommendations.overview: Wrongfully convicted of murder, a clumsy electronics salesman faces police corruption and criminal conspiracies in an attempt to prove his innocence.
